title: speculantha atriola
intro: Speculantha atriola, also known as blue mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Speculantha atriola include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and lowering blood pressure, due to its adaptogenic properties. Herbal preparations of Speculantha atriola include teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
